zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Margaret Herle於1383年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓時，她的父親Andrew Herle29歲，母親Juliana le Rous25歲。她於1406年4月與Sir John Paunceforte在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年在英國英格蘭享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Margaret Herle于1383年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓时，她的父亲Andrew Herle29岁，母亲Juliana le Rous25岁。她于1406年4月与Sir John Paunceforte在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托丁頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1410年在英国英格兰享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Herle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from French Perlet, a variant of Parlet, a diminutive of Parlier .

variants.name: Perel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Aron, Shira, Yitzchok.  Russian Oleg, Yelena, Mikhail, Vladimir, Yuriy.  German Arno, Hannelore.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Perl ‘pearl’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Margaret Herle was born in 1383, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Andrew Herle, was 29 and her mother, Juliana le Rous, was 25. She married Sir John Paunceforte in April 1406, in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1410, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Margaret Herle est née en 1383, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Andrew Herle, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Juliana le Rous, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Paunceforte en avril 1406, à Toddington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1410, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Margaret Herle 1383 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew Herle 29 und ihre Mutter Juliana le Rous 25. Sie hat im April 1406 in Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Paunceforte geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1410 im Alter von 27 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Margaret Herle è nata il nel 1383 nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Andrew Herle, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Juliana le Rous, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Paunceforte nel aprile 1406, nel Toddington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1410, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Margaret Herle(이)가 1383년 영국 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Herle(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Juliana le Rous(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1406년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토딩턴에서 Sir John Paunceforte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 영국 잉글랜드에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Margaret Herle родилась в 1383 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Andrew Herle было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana le Rous, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Paunceforte апрель 1406 г. в местности тоддингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1410 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.
